示例

🖥️ Lambda Labs GPU Cost Breakdown

• GPU: 1× A100 @ $1.10/hr each • Usage: 8 hours/day • Daily cost: $8.80 • Monthly cost (30 days): $264.00 • Annual cost: $3,168.00 💡 Lambda Labs rate: $1.10/GPU-hr. Spot instances can save 50-70%.
